title: [InstCombine] Remove scalable vector extracts to and from the same type

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare <8 x i32> @llvm.vector.extract.v8i32.v8i32(<8 x i32>, i64 immarg) #0

define <8 x i32> @trivial_nop(<8 x i32> %vec) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @trivial_nop(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <8 x i32> [[VEC:%.*]]
  %1 = call <8 x i32> @llvm.vector.extract.v8i32.v8i32(<8 x i32> %vec, i64 0)
  ret <8 x i32> %1
}
